title: Hyperlink in Automation Email
excerpt: Hi there, I have been very fond of the “Link” column. Great feature! I also love how we can personalize automation emails our to customers based on the different columns located on the board. However, my suggestion would…

posts.author: mrphilb84 (Phil Biega)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I have been very fond of the “Link” column. Great feature! I also love how we can personalize automation emails our to customers based on the different columns located on the board. However, my suggestion would be that when choosing to insert the “Link” in the email automation, to have the formatting be the same as on the Monday board. Currently, when I pull in the “Link” into the email it shows the Text to Display as well as the hyperlink in its entirety. In order to make the automation email cleaner to the customer, I’d like to suggest that the “Text to Display” becomes a hyperlink to the “Website”. I hope what I’m asking makes sense.

image559×751 53.8 KB

posts.author: Monty (Mike Monteiro)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a great one, thank you for entering it! I agree it would make it much cleaner to just have the display text be a hyper link.

posts.author: mrphilb84 (Phil Biega)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mike!
Thanks for your email back!
Hope to see this as part of our workflow one day!

posts.author: AnaTames (Ana Tames)
posts.cookedHtml: I also need this feature for my email automations. Hopefully the product team can help us soon with this request

posts.author: JoeyC (Joey Cardona)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to add a hyperlink would be amazing! Please include this feature

posts.author: cewright (Callie Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to be able to share zoom links and have them hyperlink in automated emails

posts.author: daytonabradley (Daytona B)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please!! This would help us dramatically. Our emails with links can be so ugly because of this issues.

posts.author: lzdig (Luke Zinn)
posts.cookedHtml: YES PLEASE! I’m honestly surprised this feature hasn’t been worked on, what’s the hold up? Having the ability to include custom links in email automations is a standard part of a typical automation process.

posts.author: CWest (Chloe Westhead)
posts.cookedHtml: We’d also require this for our automation to make the emails look more professional

posts.author: Thaddeus (Thaddeus Stegall)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have this as well!

posts.author: SBT (SBT)
posts.cookedHtml: I cannot believe this issue hasn’t been fixed - almost three years later!! This is such a basic requirement for mass emails that I didn’t even check to see if it worked properly before purchasing CRM. Major regrets.

posts.author: SamuelAdvenard (Samuel Advenard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m also interested in having the hyperlink included in the email. When I send an email via integration to my team, it would be more efficient for us to have the linked board as a hyperlink to improve our process.

Let me know if this is possible.

Thanks!

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@SamuelAdvenard if u are open to marketplace apps, u can try out Supermail which offers this functionality.
https://monday.com/marketplace/10000247

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
For whoever is open using a marketplace app, I can suggest using SuperMail which allows hyperlinks in automated emails plus full rich text design editor and email tracking.

https://monday.com/marketplace/10000247

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Monday Team! Is there any update on this?

This would be highly valuable to our team. Paying for a marketplace app is a scam, when the functionality of hyperlinking from a contacts profile (or in this case a board) should be included with a basic CRM automations.

posts.author: CoachClint (Clint Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an absolute miss on Monday’s part. Even the text editor is beyond sub par. CRM means Customer Relationship Management and Monday needs a refresher as to what that means. As anyone in sales knows CTA’s are a vital part of communicating with your clients. As some of the comments posted - seriously attachments - these are simple features to be added. a swing and a miss

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mrphilb84,

You can use EasyMails, it offers much better link management with drag and drop email template builder

posts.author: slyons (Shannon Lyons)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add this function … sending an entire link looks so silly.

posts.author: Mayana (Mayana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday team,

Can you please update us on this matter??
I would love to have this feature without having to use a third party (since triggers are limited).
